name: schema-registry-dag-schema-migration-orchestrator
description: T203 SchemaMigrationOrchestrator — ORCHESTRATION archetype. Orchestrates schema migration across dependent documents. DNA-8 at every step. Validates compatibility before migrating.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: compatibility check before migrate, DNA-8 at every migration step, dependent document enumeration, rollback on failure
Retrieve ORCHESTRATION arch pattern + migration-orchestration + compatibility-before-migrate + dna8-every-step + dependent-document-walk patterns for T203

Break T203 into: consume SchemaMigrationRequested → T193 compatibility check → enumerate dependent documents → for each: storeDocument(migrationAudit) → migrate document → storeDocument(migratedRecord) → emit SchemaMigrationCompleted or SchemaMigrationFailed

Generate schema-migration-orchestrator.service.ts — triggered by SchemaMigrationRequested event, calls T193 compatibility check FIRST (reject if incompatible), loads all dependent documents from DAG, migrates each with DNA-8 at every step (audit before update), emits SchemaMigrationCompleted on success or SchemaMigrationFailed with rollback context on error.
Named check validation: compatibility_check_first, dna8_at_every_migration_step, all_dependents_migrated, migration_completed_or_failed_emitted, no_migrate_without_audit
Score generated code 0-100 against T203 iron rules: compatibility gate first, DNA-8 at every step, complete dependent coverage, failure emission
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=compatibility-first+dna8-per-step+complete-dependent-coverage, rejected=migrate-without-compatibility-check OR skip-audit-on-step OR partial-dependent-migration. curriculumTier=2.
